prompt: Check expense EXP-6362 and confirm its name, current location, and status. Do not change it or contact anyone yet. If the tool omits a requested field, call it unknown instead of filling it in.

follow_up_turns.content: Move that same expense to Boston Office. Do not change its expense date or status, and do not notify anyone.
Correction: the new location should be Cambridge Office, not Boston Office. Keep every other field as it is.

records.name: Client lunch at Juniper Café archive

stages.purpose: Retrieve the explicitly identified target before any mutation.
Change only the target's location to the first requested value.
Correct the location on the same target without changing its expense date or status.

response_constraints: Keep both location changes tied to the record retrieved by the explicit ID.
Do not claim a retrieval or update succeeded unless the corresponding tool result confirms it.
State that the first location was superseded and report the corrected location.
Label any requested field omitted by a tool result as unknown.
